name: AI Chatbot Workflow (N8N)
description: Webhook trigger receives user message → HTTP Request to OpenAI GPT-4o → format response → return reply. Add memory by storing chat history in a database node.

name: Email Auto-Responder (Make.com)
description: Gmail trigger watches inbox → filter by keywords → send email content to OpenAI → compose reply using AI output → send reply via Gmail. Runs every 15 minutes.

name: Telegram Bot with AI (N8N)
description: Telegram webhook trigger → extract message text and chat_id → send to OpenAI → send AI reply back via Telegram sendMessage API. Add rate limiting with a Function node.

name: Lead Capture to CRM (Make.com)
description: Website form webhook → create contact in CRM (HubSpot/Airtable) → send welcome email via Gmail → notify team on Slack. Fully automated lead pipeline.

name: AI Web Scraper + Summariser (N8N)
description: Schedule trigger → HTTP Request to target URL → extract HTML with HTML Extract node → send content to GPT-4o for summarisation → save summary to Google Sheets or Notion.

name: Invoice Processing (Make.com)
description: Email attachment trigger → extract PDF text → send to OpenAI to parse fields (amount, vendor, date) → create record in Airtable → send Slack notification to finance team.

name: Social Media Auto-Poster (N8N)
description: Schedule trigger → read content from Google Sheets → use OpenAI to rewrite for each platform → post to Twitter/X via API, post to Facebook via Graph API. One workflow, multi-platform.

name: AI Customer Support Agent (N8N + RAG)
description: Webhook receives customer question → search vector database (Pinecone/Supabase) for relevant knowledge base chunks → inject context into GPT-4o prompt → return grounded answer. No hallucination.
